response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software craftsman with deep web/backend experience, but the role requires SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep-learning workload performance analysis. The resume shows no GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, DNN training/inference optimization, or hardware-software co-design experience, and no advanced degree in a relevant engineering field. The skill mismatch is fundamental rather than marginal.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across multiple stacks
Low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/sec, async I/O)
Some embedded systems exposure and C/C++ work at National Instruments
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning / DNN training or inference optimization background
Educational path (BS only) without the 8+ years in a directly relevant hardware/performance domain

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No DNN or GPU performance analysis experience
